code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction with safety risks/complete product failure
    - Multi-purchase defects overriding initial satisfaction
    - Usability failures making product impractical
    - Explicit warnings against purchase with defect evidence

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Core functionality compromised despite minor positives
    - Requires constant workarounds for basic use
    - Regret expressed through "waste of money" phrases
    - Clearly inferior to alternatives in key aspects

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with contextual compromises
    - Conditional praise without recommendation
    - Technical competence with notable tradeoffs
    - Target audience restrictions without endorsement

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Explicit star deduction phrases ("only reason not 5")
    - Single functional flaw impacting core utility
    - Brief positive statements lacking enthusiasm
    - Resolved issues mentioned as lingering drawbacks
    - Assembly/setup difficulties despite satisfaction

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - 3+ complementary aspects praised (function/design/durability)
    - Long-term validation with sustained performance
    - Non-functional criticism WITH enthusiastic praise
    - Explicit "still 5 stars" despite minor flaws
    - Outperforms alternatives in key aspects
    - Exceptional performance post-break-in/setup
    - Comparable to top products with clear satisfaction
    - Practical benefits dramatically outweigh limitations

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Would be 5 stars but..." →4 if functional, →5 if non-functional
    - Praise + 1 functional criticism →4
    - Praise + 1 non-functional criticism →5
    - Multi-purchase failures →1 regardless of initial experience
    - Concise praise without negatives →5
    - Core functionality achieved despite setup →5 if flawless post-setup
    - Comparisons showing parity with top products →5
    - Resolved setup issues →5 if no lingering drawbacks
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Second unit failed faster than first. Dangerous defects!"
<Reasoning>Multiple safety failures override any positives →1.</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Nearly matches Lodge cast iron quality. Excellent daily performer!"
<Reasoning>Favorable comparison to top brand with satisfaction →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Required 2 washes but now best towels ever! Worth the wait."
<Reasoning>Exceptional post-setup performance despite initial effort →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "These work great after washing smell out. Stiff edges remain."
<Reasoning>Resolved issue with lingering functional drawback →4.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Rollers handle bumps perfectly! Installation took muscle."
<Reasoning>Core functionality excellence outweighs setup effort →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Good for light use. Thin material concerns for heavy loads."
<Reasoning>Functional adequacy with notable compromise →3.</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Does the job but constantly needs readjusting. Frustrating."
<Reasoning>Frequent workarounds needed →2.</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Stunning design overshadows minor thickness quirk."
<Reasoning>Non-functional criticism with core praise →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Conceptually smart but impractical in daily use."
<Reasoning>Core usability failure →1.</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Solid performer after break-in. Initial absorbency issues."
<Reasoning>Functional prerequisite impacts initial experience →4.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (26 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 14
  gold 5 -> 4: 4
  gold 4 -> 3: 2
  gold 5 -> 3: 1
  gold 1 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "Wax and wicks. They work just fine."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This machine seems determined to foil every effort I make to clean my carpets. The bottom section never works. It's job is to collect the dirty water, but since the top section hardly puts any water out at all, it doesn't have much to do. I have labo..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I'm partial to the Presto Pop Lite hot air popper, but it looks cheap and plasticy, so I tried this.

All in all this works like the Presto or any other hot air popper, but it has a couple nuances (good and bad):

This unit is more compact and attrac..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 2, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "We are both tough on dish towels and use them constantly. Not only do we cook 90% of our meals at home but we also use fresh fruits and veggies with pretty much every meal and that means a lot of washing, drying and carrying things around...why carry..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This is a good, though not extra ordinary storage bin. It lacks exceptional build quality, exceptional attention to detail, or anything that's all that remarkable. It looks good, and the pattern is timeless, plus it keeps stuff together. You could do..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 26 errors, 19 borderline out of 80 examples."}
